'''gakoto''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kymograph|kymograph]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-k-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kymograph|kymograph]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gakoto
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæketeth|gæketeth]] || [[word:gæketej|gæketej]] || [[word:gæketesh|gæketesh]] || [[word:gækete|gækete]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gakokototh|gakokototh]] || [[word:gakokotoj|gakokotoj]] || [[word:gakokotosh|gakokotosh]] || [[word:gakokoto|gakokoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gakototh|gakototh]] || [[word:gakotoj|gakotoj]] || [[word:gakotosh|gakotosh]] || [[word:gakoto|gakoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gakoftoth|gakoftoth]] || [[word:gakoftoj|gakoftoj]] || [[word:gakoftosh|gakoftosh]] || [[word:gakoftof|gakoftof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gakototho|gakototho]] || [[word:gakotojo|gakotojo]] || [[word:gakotosho|gakotosho]] || [[word:gakotoko|gakotoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gakototh|gakototh]] || [[word:gakotoj|gakotoj]] || [[word:gakotosh|gakotosh]] || [[word:gakoto|gakoto]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gakotothol|gakotothol]] || [[word:gakotojol|gakotojol]] || [[word:gakotoshol|gakotoshol]] || [[word:gakotokol|gakotokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gakotothotho|gakotothotho]] || [[word:gakotojojo|gakotojojo]] || [[word:gakotoshosho|gakotoshosho]] || [[word:gakotoko|gakotoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gakotothon|gakotothon]] || [[word:gakotojon|gakotojon]] || [[word:gakotoshon|gakotoshon]] || [[word:gakotokon|gakotokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gakotothoro|gakotothoro]] || [[word:gakotojoro|gakotojoro]] || [[word:gakotoshoro|gakotoshoro]] || [[word:gakotokoro|gakotokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
